description:
Complete footer redesign consolidating FRAC-82 and FRAC-50. Changes:

1. Make 'Fractal' camelCase (not all-caps) wherever it appears in the footer.
2. Add the following CTA text: "IF YOU'RE IN NYC AND WOULD LIKE TO INTRODUCE YOURSELF, JOIN OUR DISCORD AND POST IN #INTROS. PREFER A ONE-ON-ONE CONVERSATION? SCHEDULE A VIRTUAL CHAT WITH IAN."
3. Include: NEW YORK CITY and HELLO@FRACTALNYC.COM
4. All text in the black footer area should be white.
5. Text should be centered and span across the full width.
6. 'Fractus' (the brand font text) should be camelCase and italic.

This supersedes FRAC-82 and FRAC-50 — those can be marked cancelled once this ships. File: src/components/layout/Footer.tsx. Schedule LAST to avoid conflicts (no other task touches Footer.tsx).

Ian scheduling link for the CTA: https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/appointments/schedules/AcZssZ0JUlLukwG9ny_ji86woEKDTE2qWsePnoAz9Ao3Rl4SBssPVd_56rmYcnbb4oO6dIlPiqybWrSo
title: Footer overhaul: content, CTA, styling, Fractal camelCase
